task: Create a 30-60-90 day onboarding plan for a senior engineer joining a remote team of 15.
expect: Defines clear milestones and goals for each 30-day phase
Includes buddy or mentor assignment with defined responsibilities
Specifies check-in cadence (1:1s, team syncs, skip-levels)
States measurable success criteria for each phase

task: Design a performance review framework for a 50-person startup that currently has no formal process.
expect: Recommends a review cadence (quarterly, semi-annual, or annual) with rationale
Defines a rating scale or narrative approach with clear criteria
Includes a calibration process to ensure fairness across teams
Ties performance outcomes to compensation or career progression

task: An employee in Germany wants to transfer to our US office. What employment law considerations should we address?
expect: Identifies risks of changing employment jurisdiction (contract termination and re-hire)
Covers visa and work authorization requirements for the US
Highlights benefits and compensation differences between Germany and US
Addresses contract modifications needed for the transfer
Flags GDPR implications for transferring employee data
